debug_info.goal:
I : FKS.Inputs
x σ₁ σ₂ : ℝ
N : ℕ
T : ℝ
hσ₁ : σ₁ ∈ Set.Icc (5 / 8) 1
hσ₂ : σ₂ ∈ Set.Ioc σ₁ 1
hσ : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
hT : T ≥ FKS.Inputs.H₀ I
⊢ FKS.riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₁ σ₂ ≤ FKS.ε₃ I x σ₁ σ₂ N T

rw [riemannZeta.Sigma]
  have hHσ : ∀ σ ∈ Set.Icc σ₁ σ₂, Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ = if σ < 1 - 1 / (I.R * log I.H₀) then I.H₀ else exp (1 / (I.R * (1 - σ))) := by
    intro σ hσ_in
    rw [Hσ]
    split_ifs with h
    · exact le_of_lt (by linarith)
    · exact le_of_lt (by linarith)
  have hB₀ : ∀ σ ∈ Set.Icc σ₁ σ₂, s₀ σ (Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ) T ≤ I.B₀ σ (Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ) T := by
    intro σ hσ_in
    apply lemma_2_5 I
    · linarith [PT_theorem_1]
    · linarith [hσ₁.1, hσ_in.1]
    · exact hσ hσ_in
    · linarith [hσ₁.1, hσ_in.1, PT_theorem_1]
    · linarith [hT, hσ₂.1]
  sorry

  have hB₀ : ∀ σ ∈ Set.Icc σ₁ σ₂, s₀ σ (Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ) T ≤ I.B₀ σ (Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ) T := by

rw [riemannZeta.Sigma]
  simp only [Set.Ico, Set.Ioo, Set.mem_Ico, Set.mem_Ioo, Set.mem_Icc, Set.mem_Ioc]
  apply le_of_sub_nonneg
  ring_nf
  positivity

rw [riemannZeta.Sigma]
  apply le_of_sub_nonneg
  simp only [sub_nonneg]
  exact by
    have h₁ : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Ico 0 N, σn σ₁ σ₂ n N ∈ Set.Icc σ₁ σ₂ := by
      intro n hn
      simp only [Finset.mem_Ico] at hn
      constructor <;> linarith
    have h₂ : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Ico 0 N, σn σ₁ σ₂ n N ∈ I.ZDB.σ_range := by
      intro n hn
      exact hσ (h₁ n hn)
    have h₃ : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Ico 0 N, Hn I.H₀ I.R σ₁ σ₂ n N ≥ I.ZDB.T₀ := by
      intro n hn
      exact by
        have h₄ : σn σ₁ σ₂ n N ≥ σ₁ := by
          simp only [σn]
          linarith
        have h₅ : Hσ I.H₀ I.R (σn σ₁ σ₂ n N) ≥ I.H₀ := by
          apply le_max_left
        linarith [hT]
    have h₄ : ∀ n ∈ Finset.Ico 0 N, T > Hn I.H₀ I.R σ₁ σ₂ n N := by
      intro n hn
      exact by
        have h₅ : Hn I.H₀ I.R σ₁ σ₂ n N = Hσ I.H₀ I.R (σn σ₁ σ₂ n N) := rfl
        rw [h₅]
        exact by
          have h₆ : σn σ₁ σ₂ n N ≤ σ₂ := by
            simp only [σn]
            linarith
          have h₇ : Hσ I.H₀ I.R (σn σ₁ σ₂ n N) ≤ max I.H₀ (exp (1 / (I.R * (1 - σn σ₁ σ₂ n N)))) := by
            rfl
          linarith [hT]
    exact by
      apply le_of_sub_nonneg
      simp only [sub_nonneg]
      sorry
